surface_verification.method: pyyaml parse of .github/workflows/ci.yml + assertions: job name 'Diff coverage (gate)', continue-on-error removed, action pinned to 40-char SHA f36a656208b512e3260c6e95dbad84bb1650f223.

test_completeness.justification: Trivial CI-workflow change (remove continue-on-error + action SHA-pin); no app runtime/source behavior to unit-test. Ledger auto-n/a at trivial; the only behavior is CI-side, exercised by the PR's own CI run.
